overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic Arasaka corporate facility from Cyberpunk 2077. The camera moves past a large mech and several people in an open hangar, approaches a hexagonal structure with the illuminated Arasaka logo, and continues down a sleek corridor toward an entrance marked '2077'.

events.description: passes the red velvet ropes and enters the open hangar floor area

agents.ego_description: walking past a large mech unit and red barriers toward a group of people in the hangar

notable_agents.action: person in black tactical gear standing with arms crossed near the center
two people conversing near the right wall

entered.detail: massive dark military mech with red accents on display
red ropes on silver stanchions marking a path
dark reflective flooring with yellow circular markings
sleek dark metal walls with horizontal light strips

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a vast futuristic hangar with a large mech unit displayed on the left. The camera moves forward past red velvet rope barriers toward a sparse group of people standing in the open space. The environment features dark polished floors with yellow markings and sleek metallic walls illuminated by overhead industrial lighting.

events.description: approaching the large hexagonal Arasaka corporate structure
camera tilts upward to reveal the illuminated Arasaka logo on the structure facade

agents.ego_description: approaching the hexagonal structure and looking up at the Arasaka logo before passing through

notable_agents.action: person in white outfit walking away from the camera toward the left

entered.detail: tall structure with geometric hexagonal pattern facade
illuminated white Arasaka corporation logo and text
brightly lit white base platform at the structure entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the open hangar toward an imposing hexagonal structure with the Arasaka logo illuminated at the top. After tilting up to view the logo, the camera continues forward past the structure's glowing base. A person in white clothing walks away to the left as the scene transitions into a narrower corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: long sleek corridor with linear lighting

events.description: enters the narrow corridor passing the Arasaka structure
approaching the illuminated entrance with 2077 signage visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down a long corridor with geometric wall patterns toward a distant entrance

entered.detail: dark metallic walls with horizontal silver stripes and linear lights
long fluorescent light strips running the length of the corridor ceiling
illuminated sign displaying 2077 above glass entrance doors

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows a long, narrow corridor with sleek dark walls and continuous linear lighting overhead. The camera moves steadily forward through the empty passage toward a distant illuminated entrance. As the camera approaches, an entrance sign with '2077' becomes visible above glass doors, marking the end of the corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vast corporate hangar that gradually narrows into a sleek, futuristic corridor. It begins by gliding past a large mech unit and red velvet rope barriers across dark polished floors, moving toward a sparse group of people under industrial lighting. As the camera advances, the open space gives way to an imposing hexagonal structure, tilting upward to reveal an illuminated Arasaka logo before passing its glowing base. The scene then shifts into a long, narrow passage with dark walls and linear overhead lighting as a figure in white walks away to the left. Finally, the camera moves steadily through the empty corridor toward a distant glass entrance marked with an illuminated 2077 sign.
